tables.title: MassDEP Reviewed Performance Standards For Massachusetts Public Water Suppliers (Municipal)
tables.description: Average Annual Water Demand from Public Water Suppliers that have been reviewed by MassDEP. Residential Gallons per Capita Day is the average number of gallons used per resident per day over the calendar year. Massachusetts state standard = 65 gal/capita/day. Blank values indicates that there was insufficient data to calculate a value.  Reasons include: system not 100% metered; master meter malfunction; or seasonal population issues.
